ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "client_industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Name or ID of the account manager handling the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tooltip_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tooltip item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the tooltip item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the tooltip item (e.g., title, label, etc.) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the tooltip item */,
  "item_properties" TEXT /* Additional properties of the tooltip item (JSON format) */,
  "item_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the tooltip item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tooltip_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who created the configuration */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tooltip item being configured */,
  "override_value" TEXT /* Override value for the tooltip item */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created or last updated */,
  "config_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tooltip_configurations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tooltip_configurations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES tooltip_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customization_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customization option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the customization option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the customization option (e.g., text, color, etc.) */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the customization option */,
  "option_default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the customization option */,
  "option_constraints" TEXT /* Constraints for the customization option (JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who created the preference */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customization option being preferred */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preferred customization option */,
  "preference_description" TEXT /* Description of the preference */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was created or last updated */,
  "preference_status" TEXT /* Status of the preference (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_preferences_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES customization_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_preferences_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tooltip_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tooltip element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the tooltip element */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of the tooltip element (e.g., title, body, etc.) */,
  "element_description" TEXT /* Description of the tooltip element */,
  "element_properties" TEXT /* Additional properties of the tooltip element (JSON format) */,
  "element_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the tooltip element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who used the tooltip component */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tooltip element used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the tooltip component was used */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage event */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage event in seconds */,
  "usage_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the tooltip was used (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_usage_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES tooltip_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_usage_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who used the tooltip component */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tooltip element used */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked (e.g., click rate, hover rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., client dashboard, automated script) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES tooltip_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overrides" (
  "override_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each override */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who created the override */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tooltip element being overridden */,
  "override_value" TEXT /* Value of the override */,
  "override_description" TEXT /* Description of the override */,
  "override_date" TEXT /* Date when the override was created or last updated */,
  "override_status" TEXT /* Status of the override (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("override_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overrides_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES tooltip_elements ("element_id")
)
